creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Wed Nov 20 03:14:56 2013
New Revision: 334372
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/334372

Log:
  - Update to 20131115
  - While I'm here:
    - Convert to new options helper
    - Support STAGEDIR
  
  Changes:	https://github.com/sstephenson/ruby-build/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
  PR:		ports/184095
  Submitted by:	Fabian M. Borschel <fmb@onibox.net> (maintainer)

Deleted:
  head/devel/ruby-build/files/
Modified:
  head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile
  head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile	Wed Nov 20 03:14:52 2013	(r334371)
+++ head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile	Wed Nov 20 03:14:56 2013	(r334372)
@@ -1,11 +1,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ruby-build
-PORTVERSION=	20130518
+PORTVERSION=	20131115
 CATEGORIES=	devel ruby
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL} \
-		http://people.freebsd.org/~swills/ \
-		GH
+MASTER_SITES=	GH
 
 MAINTAINER=	fmb@onibox.net
 COMMENT=	Compile and install different ruby versions
@@ -22,17 +20,11 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	autoconf:${PORTSDIR}/devel/
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	RBENV
 RBENV_DESC=	Install rbenv for installation support
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	RBENV
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRBENV}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	rbenv:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rbenv
-.endif
+RBENV_RUN_DEPENDS=	rbenv:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rbenv
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	sstephenson
-GH_COMMIT=	1b170ee
+GH_COMMIT=	49c1070
 GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
@@ -43,10 +35,10 @@ PLIST_FILES=	bin/ruby-build \
 PORTDATA=	*
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/ruby-build ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/rbenv-install ${PREFIX}/libexec
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/rbenv-uninstall ${PREFIX}/libexec
-	@${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
-	( cd ${WRKSRC}/share/ruby-build && ${COPYTREE_BIN} \* ${DATADIR} )
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/ruby-build ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/rbenv-install ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/libexec
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/rbenv-uninstall ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/libexec
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
+	( cd ${WRKSRC}/share/ruby-build && ${COPYTREE_BIN} \* ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR} )
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo	Wed Nov 20 03:14:52 2013	(r334371)
+++ head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo	Wed Nov 20 03:14:56 2013	(r334372)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ruby-build-20130518.tar.gz) = bd1f26d30a628fe4f0d775c29bd493b8cfd5d4f9029aa05093a19d7b82066a8f
-SIZE (ruby-build-20130518.tar.gz) = 21763
+SHA256 (ruby-build-20131115.tar.gz) = 3c6260264744ad543ad4943f741d13db00f5add785f2c0ae3d05c9388d81fb48
+SIZE (ruby-build-20131115.tar.gz) = 27491
